'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=zE37r0kg1mNmsqchJic60BEcEr0hPfqQI1Hd7C8C4MQ-1770839309-1.0.1.1-xs0ns7OXR8guRiOQGwTYkNooixd9Ws8UU2SqyEvP570"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
